title: selaginella pervillei
intro: Selaginella pervillei, also known as Polypodioid fern or Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginella genus, characterized by its delicate, spiky foliage and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Selaginella pervillei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion, among others. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella pervillei is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
